interpretation.why_not_complete: The released-data panel mapping is complete for Level A traceability, but it does not unblock live Kit evaluation, trained VAE/diffusion reproduction, Fig.5/Fig.6, or real robot deployment.

scope: Trace released-data paper panel mappings to generated artifacts, extracted Dataset_beyondmimic files, and the immutable raw zip. This does not reproduce paper-only, blocked Fig.5/Fig.6, or hardware claims.
